sentences.arabic: كَانَ مَنْزِلُ الْعَائِلَةِ صَغِيرًا لَكِنَّهُ مَلِيءٌ بِالْحُبِّ.
sentences.translation: Kuća porodice bila je mala ali puna ljubavi.
sentences.translationEn: The family's house was small but full of love.

sentences.arabic: كَانَتِ الأُمُّ تُزَيِّنُهُ بِالزُّهُورِ فِي كُلِّ فَصْلٍ.
sentences.translation: Majka ga je krasila cvijećem u svakom godišnjem dobu.
sentences.translationEn: The mother used to decorate it with flowers in every season.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ الأَبُ يُصْلِحُ كُلَّ شَيْءٍ يَتَعَطَّلُ بِيَدَيْهِ.
sentences.translation: Otac bi popravljao vlastitim rukama sve što bi se pokvarilo.
sentences.translationEn: The father would fix with his own hands everything that broke down.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ ذَلِكَ الْبَيْتُ الصَّغِيرُ أَسْعَدَ مَكَانٍ فِي الدُّنْيَا.
sentences.translation: Ta mala kućica bila je najsretniji kutak na svijetu.
sentences.translationEn: That small house was the happiest place in the world.
